problem id: c6a1ba04
category: bit_manipulation

rule: SHL(6) XOR SHR(7)

examples:
  11010100 -> 00000001
  01101000 -> 00000000
  01011110 -> 10000000
  11100000 -> 00000001
  00101011 -> 11000000
  00010001 -> 01000000
  10101001 -> 01000001
  00011100 -> 00000000

query: 10011010
predicted answer: 10000001
